targets.description: Parse every CSS-family source through the canonical query parser surface.
targets.limitation: This proves parser acceptance and reported syntax errors; it does not claim browser rendering equivalence.

targets.description: Resolve the workspace style graph and report unresolved module edges.
targets.limitation: Dynamic runtime module construction remains outside the static workspace graph.

targets.description: Run the formatter twice without writing and require the second result to be stable.
targets.limitation: Formatting stability is checked for discovered CSS-family files under the selected root.

targets.description: Evaluate configured bundle entries through the typed closed-world admission outcome.
targets.limitation: The item is skipped when no bundle entries are configured for the workspace.

targets.description: Compare committed CSS Modules declarations and interface JSON with canonical outputs.
targets.limitation: The item is skipped when the workspace contains no CSS Module source.

targets.description: Compare transform observations with an engine-owned staged translation-validation report.
targets.limitation: The engine mechanism exists, but no workspace-scoped observation-equality report is exposed by the CLI yet.

targets.description: Detect regressions in analysis precision across a user workspace.
targets.limitation: The precision lattice is live, but a persisted workspace-to-workspace comparison report is not available.

targets.description: Compile discovered Sass entries with the pinned Dart Sass bridge and retain execution evidence.
targets.limitation: The item runs only when [verify].externalCorpus is advisory and a Sass source is present.

targets.description: Validate the engine discharge ledger and its solver-backed coverage.
targets.limitation: This developer-harness gate is not a user-workspace CSS verdict.

targets.description: Validate the engine semantic-preservation model corpus.
targets.limitation: This developer-harness gate measures the engine, not the selected user workspace.

targets.description: Ensure known-bad transformations are rejected by engine validation stages.
targets.limitation: This is a mutation corpus gate and does not classify user CSS as valid or invalid.

targets.description: Close the engine verification plane over its committed gate artifacts.
targets.limitation: This aggregate developer gate requires a source checkout and the repository toolchain.

targets.description: Replay captured external corpus regressions against the engine test harness.
targets.limitation: The corpus farm is engine evidence and is intentionally separate from workspace verification.
